NOTICE OF TENDER

Procurement Number: PP1R-TEST-2026-001
Title: Supply and Delivery of Industrial Control Equipment
Issuing Authority: Test Procurement Agency
Submission Deadline: 2026-08-15

This is a synthetic test notice for PP1R testing purposes only — tender operator workflow.

Scope:
- Supply of industrial control equipment per technical specification
- Delivery to specified locations
- 2-year warranty period
- Installation and commissioning support

Eligibility:
- Valid SRO approval in relevant construction/installation category
- ISO 9001 certification or equivalent
- Prior experience in similar contracts (minimum 3 contracts)
- No tax arrears
